_comment: PLM 项目的 Claude Code 共享配置。个人权限缓存写在 settings.local.json (gitignored)。hooks 设计与排错见 .claude/hooks-design.md。

hooks.command: echo '' >&2 && echo '─── reflect on this turn ────────────────────────────────────────' >&2 && echo 'Did this turn produce knowledge worth keeping?' >&2 && echo '  • New gotcha?       → append to .claude/skills/ruoyi-bootstrap/references/gotchas.md' >&2 && echo '  • Architecture call? → write an ADR in 03-开发/ADR/' >&2 && echo '  • Rule contradiction → open a proposal in 99-跨阶段/proposals/' >&2 && echo '  • Touched a Gate phase? → update gate-checklists/instances/<module>/' >&2 && echo '────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────' >&2

command="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_command"; case "$command" in *'git commit'*) echo '💡 pre-commit hook will run plm-backend/scripts/check-encoding.sh (proposal 0200). To bypass: git commit --no-verify (records to signals).' >&2 ;; *'DROP DATABASE'*|*'DROP TABLE'*|*'TRUNCATE TABLE'*|*'git push --force'*|*'git push -f'*|*'git reset --hard'*|*'rm -rf /'*|*'rm -rf ~'*) echo '⚠️  HIGH-RISK COMMAND DETECTED' >&2; echo '   Command: '"$command" >&2; echo '   This command is normally blocked. If user explicitly authorised, proceed.' >&2; echo '   Otherwise, STOP and ask for confirmation via AskUserQuestion.' >&2 ;; esac; exit 0

path="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$path" in *'gate-checklists/instances/'*) echo '⚠️  EDITING SIGNED GATE CHECKLIST INSTANCE' >&2; echo '   Path: '"$path" >&2; echo '   These files are immutable once signed.' >&2; echo '   Add a 「修订记录」 entry instead of overwriting content.' >&2 ;; *'.claude/rules.md'*|*'03-开发/开发规范.md'*|*'gate-checklists/Phase'*'-Gate.md'*|*'proposals/README.md'*|*'proposals/0000-template.md'*|*'.claude/settings.json'*) echo '⚠️  EDITING CANONICAL SPEC FILE (per rules.md §L.2 & proposal 0201)' >&2; echo '   Path: '"$path" >&2; echo '   Should this go through a proposal?' >&2; echo '   • If yes → create 99-跨阶段/proposals/NNNN-*.md first (or invoke /proposal Mode A)' >&2; echo '   • If solo + same-day → ensure commit includes proposal file + diff (0040 §3.5)' >&2; echo '   • If User-requested-bypass → must retroactively write proposal in same session (rules.md §L.2 例外)' >&2 ;; esac; exit 0

prompt="$CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT"; case "$prompt" in *'新功能'*|*'加功能'*|*'新模块'*|*'新业务'*|*'new feature'*|*'add module'*) echo '💡 detected intent: new business feature' >&2; echo '   Consider triggering the ruoyi-bootstrap skill Phase 7, and create the Gate Checklist instance in 99-跨阶段/gate-checklists/instances/' >&2 ;; *'上线'*|*'发布'*|*'release'*|*'deploy'*) echo '💡 detected intent: release' >&2; echo '   Phase 05 Gate must be filled: 99-跨阶段/gate-checklists/Phase05-上线-Gate.md' >&2 ;; *'回滚'*|*'rollback'*|*'revert'*) echo '💡 detected intent: rollback' >&2; echo '   Check 05-上线/Runbook.md and follow the documented rollback steps' >&2 ;; *'反思'*|*'周报'*|*'月报'*|*'季报'*|*'/reflect-weekly'*|*'/reflect-monthly'*|*'/reflect-quarterly'*) echo '💡 detected intent: 自进化反思 (per proposal 0201)' >&2; echo '   skill 自动加载: reflect-weekly / reflect-monthly / reflect-quarterly' >&2; echo '   前门文档: 99-跨阶段/self-evolution.md' >&2 ;; *'升格'*|*'lift'*|*'apply 0'*|*'/proposal'*|*'转 proposal'*|*'创建提案'*) echo '💡 detected intent: proposal lifecycle (per proposal 0201)' >&2; echo '   skill 自动加载: proposal (Mode A lift / Mode B apply / Mode C status)' >&2; echo '   决策树: .claude/skills/proposal/references/decision-tree.md' >&2 ;; *'采集信号'*|*'collect signals'*|*'signals 数据'*|*'/signals-collect'*) echo '💡 detected intent: signals 采集 (per proposal 0201)' >&2; echo '   skill 自动加载: signals-collect (Phase D 输入基础设施)' >&2; echo '   输出: 99-跨阶段/signals/YYYY-MM-supplementary.md (不覆盖主文件)' >&2 ;; *'审计'*|*'audit'*|*'tracking'*) echo '💡 detected intent: tracking / audit (per proposal 0201)' >&2; echo '   月底走 reflect-monthly 含 tracking 终结 7 步; 中段可走 ad-hoc audit reflect' >&2 ;; esac; exit 0

PostToolUse._comment: Phase D v0.3 (proposal 0202): tool-use 日志, 供 signals-collect Type 5 Claude 行为分析. 日志 .claude/logs/tools/YYYY-MM-DD.log gitignored. PostToolUse 输入是 stdin JSON (Claude Code 协议), 用 sed 抽取 tool_name + 80 字符截断 excerpt; 不写完整 input/response (避免敏感数据).

hooks.command:
LOG_DIR=.claude/logs/tools; mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"; LOG_FILE="$LOG_DIR/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).log"; TS=$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S); JSON=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$JSON" | sed -n 's/.*"tool_name"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | head -1); case "$TOOL" in Bash) EXCERPT=$(echo "$JSON" | sed -n 's/.*"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\(.\{0,80\}\).*/\1/p' | head -1 | tr '
' ' ' | tr '	' ' ') ;; Edit|Write|Read|NotebookEdit) EXCERPT=$(echo "$JSON" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]\{0,80\}\).*/\1/p' | head -1) ;; Agent) EXCERPT="subagent=$(echo "$JSON" | sed -n 's/.*"subagent_type"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | head -1)" ;; Skill) EXCERPT="skill=$(echo "$JSON" | sed -n 's/.*"skill"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | head -1)" ;; Grep) EXCERPT=$(echo "$JSON" | sed -n 's/.*"pattern"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\(.\{0,80\}\).*/\1/p' | head -1 | tr '
' ' ') ;; *) EXCERPT="" ;; esac; printf '%s	%s	%s
' "$TS" "${TOOL:-?}" "$EXCERPT" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
